docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY HAKIM, SHABANA H. HAMEED, SALEEM AS TO DEFENDANT CANTRALL HARRIS ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-02-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT MAIL TO CANTRALL HARRIS ASSOCIATION RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-02-1996 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT C TRIAL OF APR-02-1996 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAKIM, SHABANA H. HAMEED, SALEEM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CANTRALL HARRIS ASSOCIATION $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,040.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUN-04-1996, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HAKIM, SHABANA H. HAMEED, SALEEM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CANTRALL HARRIS ASSOCIATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
